name: Black Bean Chili Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 1 cup water to a boil in a small saucepan. Add quinoa, cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
2. Place black bean flakes in a medium-sized bowl. Stir in boiling water. Cover and let stand for 5 minutes.
3. Combine 1/2 cup cooked quinoa with the black beans, chili powder, cumin, cilantro, green onions, red bell pepper, bread crumbs, and salt. Mix well.
4. Lightly flour hands and divide the mixture into six equal balls. Flatten each ball into a 1/4-inch-thick cake.
5. Heat oil in a nonstick skillet. Cook each bean cake about 2 minutes on each side.
6. Serve topped with lettuce, cheese (cheddar or cheddar-style soy), nonfat sour cream, salsa, avocado, diced, and sliced green onions as desired.
Calories per serving: 168
Grams of fat: 3
Percent fat calories: 16
Cholesterol: 0 mg
Grams of fiber: 5.2
